image.title: NAC Bao, X Tao, W Cui, B Yi, T Pan, KH Young, W Qian

item.title: SARS-CoV-2 induced thrombocytopenia as an important biomarker significantly correlated with abnormal coagulation function, increased intravascular blood clot risk and mortality in COVID-19 patients.
